posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
We just launched a Sprout Social Integration that lets you manage your social media directly from monday.com.

Schedule posts
Track performance metrics
Monitor engagement
Use it across boards, dashboards, and widgets

No more switching tabs — everything you need from Sprout Social, now inside your monday.com workspace.

Perfect for teams managing content, campaigns, or just trying to stay on top of their brand online.

Check it out and let us know what you think!
Sprout Social Integration App
